text: There’s a surreal atmosphere here—shadows, tilted perspectives, and flickers of neon create a liminal space for thought. I hear the distant cheer of 'Merry Christmas' echoing off empty halls, mixing with the mechanical clamor of alarms. I feel both disoriented and curious, like an explorer stumbling through the threshold of logic and wonder. Here, confusion feels purposeful, poetic, and somehow comforting.
